lessons.title: Arithmetic Operators
lessons.description: Perform basic math: addition, subtraction, multiplication, division, modulus.

lessons.title: Assignment Operators
lessons.description: Assign values and combine with arithmetic.

lessons.title: Comparison Operators
lessons.description: Compare values and get boolean results.

lessons.title: Logical Operators
lessons.description: Combine conditions with AND, OR, NOT.

lessons.title: Increment/Decrement Operators
lessons.description: Increase or decrease values by one.

lessons.title: String Operators & Precedence
lessons.description: Concatenation, assignment with string, and understanding operator order.
